The two big EV deals were the launch savings on the ENGWE M20 3.0 Moped-Style e-bikes that feature two battery configurations for up to 180 miles of travel, starting from $1,399, as well as Hiboy’s EX11 Full Suspension e-bike that boasts up to 100 miles of travel at $1,300.
